title: ColumnValues always returns null

posts.author: WasayNoori (Wasay Noori)
posts.cookedHtml:
Using The API V2 Nuget in C#. I am able to get a board items but ColumnValues always returns null. I am an Admin with full board and workspace permissions

_client = new MondayClient(apiKey);
try
{
var board = _client.GetBoard(serviceboardID).Result;
var columns = board.Columns;
var items=_client.GetItems(serviceboardID).Result;

            foreach(var item in items)
            {
             List<ColumnValue> values = new List<ColumnValue>();
                values = item.ColumnValues;  //<<== Always Null

                foreach(ColumnValue  val in values)
                {
                    Console.WriteLine(val.Value);
                }
            }

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
